targets.query: from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({total: accumulator.total + 1.0, count: accumulator.count + (if r._value < 3.9 then 1.0 else 0.0)}), identity: {total: 0.0, count: 0.0}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r.count / r.total * 100.0}))

from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({total: accumulator.total + 1.0, count: accumulator.count + (if r._value >= 3.9 and r._value <= 10.0 then 1.0 else 0.0)}), identity: {total: 0.0, count: 0.0}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r.count / r.total * 100.0}))

from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({total: accumulator.total + 1.0, count: accumulator.count + (if r._value > 10.0 and r._value <= 13.9 then 1.0 else 0.0)}), identity: {total: 0.0, count: 0.0}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r.count / r.total * 100.0}))

panels.title: Very High (>13.9) — test for ketones if >2h

targets.query: from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({total: accumulator.total + 1.0, count: accumulator.count + (if r._value > 13.9 then 1.0 else 0.0)}), identity: {total: 0.0, count: 0.0}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r.count / r.total * 100.0}))

import "date"

from(bucket: "cgmsharp")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    _time: r._time,
    _value: r._value,
    _field: (if date.monthDay(t: r._time) < 10 then "0" else "") + string(v: date.monthDay(t: r._time)) + "/" + (if int(v: date.month(t: r._time)) < 10 then "0" else "") + string(v: int(v: date.month(t: r._time))),
    hour: float(v: date.hour(t: r._time)) + float(v: date.minute(t: r._time)) / 60.0
  }))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "hour"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
